examples: The documentary focuses on the razzmatazz of an American political campaign.
What China means by new is an Olympics taken to new heights of razzmatazz.
Tim Minchin's riotously eclectic score skitters unpredictably from pop to jazz to semi-Sondheim to good old-fashioned razzmatazz.
Scottish council budget meetings certainly do not have any of that razzmatazz but there is a similarity.
